creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Josef 'Jeff' Sipek from comment #7)

Apply patches from attachment #233135 and attachment #233255.  Then build x11-toolkits/wxgtk31 without GLCANVASEGL and KiCAD without EGL.  Lock these packages so they won't get overwritten by automatic updated.  Then it just works.
